history.content:
<thought>
I can see a clear path around the lava wall. In front of me is a lava cell (row 06 col D is L relative to my position), so moving forward is deadly. I’ll turn right to face the free cell on my right side (row 07 col E is .) and then proceed.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I can see lava cells (L) in front and to the left/right, and a wall (#) directly ahead-left area blocks progress. The only non-wall-looking option is to turn to seek an open floor (.) rather than trying to move into lava. I’ll turn right to look for a safe path toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
In the current local view, my position (^) is in row 07 column D. The cell in front of me (row 07 column C, since I’m facing upward) is floor “.”, which is safe. I do not see the goal “G” anywhere nearby, so the best move is to advance into the safe floor cell to continue exploring.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I can see my position at row 07 column D (shown as ^). The cell directly in front of me (upward) corresponds to row 06 column D, which is currently unknown (?) and not confirmed as lava. Forward is the only immediate move candidate (left/right would be row 07 columns C/E which are also unknown). Since I must avoid confirmed lava and walls (#), I will try moving forward into the unknown cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I can see my position at row 07, column D (shown as ^). The cell directly in front of me is row 06, column D, which is `?` (unseen), so it is not known to be lava. I will move forward into the unknown cell to explore toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
In the current view, my position is at row 07 column D (marked ^). The cell in front of me is the wall (#) at row 06 column D, so I cannot move forward. The goal is not visible, so I should change direction; turning right may open a path away from the wall.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I can see lava `L` directly in front of me (row 07 col E). The goal is not visible in this local view, so I should avoid moving into lava. I will turn right to look for a safe path (likely toward the open `.` at row 07 col F/G).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal isn’t visible in this local view. I can move forward into row 08 would be off-view, so I’ll choose a safe direction by first checking the cell to my right: right of me is '.' (there’s an open floor at row 07 column E), while forward is blocked by the lava wall column C. I will turn right to face the safe path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I see the goal isn't in my current local view. My immediate forward cell (row 06 col D) is a floor '.', so moving forward is safe and advances exploration toward the open area. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I can see the goal isn't in the local view. My facing direction is up (the cell in front of me is the row 06 column D cell), which appears to be a floor '.'. Since it's safe and can help me explore toward the open area around row 04–06, I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I can’t see the goal yet, and the cell directly in front of me is the only immediate obstacle check. From my current position (row 07 col D), the cell in front is lava (L), so moving forward would be fatal. I should turn right to find a safer adjacent cell to move toward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I can’t see the goal yet. My current row (07) shows lava at A, floor at B and C, my current position at D, and floor at E and F. Facing direction isn’t explicit, so to explore safely I’ll turn right to check an adjacent cell that appears to be floor rather than lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
In this view, I can see lava `L` directly in front of me (row 07 column E is `L` ahead of `^`), so moving forward would be deadly. The cell to my right (row 07 column F) is safe floor `.`. I’ll turn right to face that safe cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I can see the goal is not in my current local view. The cell directly in front of me is row 06, column D, which is lava 'L', so I cannot move forward. To find a safe route (likely by going around the lava), I will turn right to check the neighboring cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is not visible in the local map. I see a wall (#) directly in front of me (row 06 col D is '#'), so moving forward is blocked. I should turn to look for a safe open cell. I’ll turn left to change direction and search.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I can see the goal is not in the current local view, but the cell directly in front of me is safe. I should move forward to explore further while avoiding lava cells (L).
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
